summary: Updates README with clearly separated 'For Agents' and 'For Humans' sections, each with tailored install/use paths. Adds 391 lines of tests validating section structure, content accuracy, and representative command path execution. Covers VAL-LAUNCH-009.

strengths: For Agents section covers npx, global install, direct invocation, lifecycle commands, JSON output, error table
For Humans section covers npm install, setup-shell, Homebrew, guided lifecycle with onboard/watch
Both sections reference quickstart and doctor for validation
Tests validate that documented commands actually work when executed
README cross-references ONBOARDING.md for extended guidance
Error handling table in agent section maps error types to remediation commands

testCoverage.notes: 391 lines across 32 test cases covering: section structure validation, content requirements per audience, representative command path execution (full lifecycle for both agent and human paths), command accuracy checks, cross-reference validation
